evals.prompt: 请审查这份 AI 生成的 PPT 是否可以交付客户，重点看可编辑性、逻辑和视觉问题。
evals.expected_output: Produces findings ordered by severity with evidence: slide count, text extraction, shape/picture counts, rendering status, and residual risks.

evals.prompt: 这份 PPT 看起来不错，但我担心它其实是一堆图片，请帮我检查。
evals.expected_output: Inspects PPTX XML/package structure, reports text extractability and picture/native shape ratio, and flags full-page image risks.
